title: ABP v1 pair_request payload (Client -> Host)
description: Bind a role (§4.2). target is an existing role id or the literal 'create'. pubkey+signature are present when the host issued a pair_challenge; nonce echoes the challenge. claim carries an out-of-band-issued credential for claim_required roles.

claim.description: Host-issued claim credential (pairing code / claim token) proving the right to bind a claim_required role.
